1	"""
2	Unified tool configuration for Hermes Agent.
3	
4	`hermes tools` and `hermes setup tools` both enter this module.
5	Select a platform → toggle toolsets on/off → for newly enabled tools
6	that need API keys, run through provider-aware configuration.
7	
8	Saves per-platform tool configuration to ~/.hermes/config.yaml under
9	the `platform_toolsets` key.
10	"""
11	
12	import json as _json
13	import logging
14	import sys
15	from pathlib import Path
16	from typing import Dict, List, Optional, Set
17	
18	
19	from hermes_cli.config import (
20	    load_config, save_config, get_env_value, save_env_value,
21	)
22	from hermes_cli.colors import Colors, color
23	
24	logger = logging.getLogger(__name__)
25	
26	PROJECT_ROOT = Path(__file__).parent.parent.resolve()
27	
28	
29	# ─── UI Helpers (shared with setup.py) ────────────────────────────────────────
30	
31	def _print_info(text: str):
32	    print(color(f"  {text}", Colors.DIM))
33	
34	def _print_success(text: str):
35	    print(color(f"✓ {text}", Colors.GREEN))
36	
37	def _print_warning(text: str):
38	    print(color(f"⚠ {text}", Colors.YELLOW))
39	
40	def _print_error(text: str):
41	    print(color(f"✗ {text}", Colors.RED))
42	
43	def _prompt(question: str, default: str = None, password: bool = False) -> str:
44	    if default:
45	        display = f"{question} [{default}]: "
46	    else:
47	        display = f"{question}: "
48	    try:
49	        if password:
50	            import getpass
51	            value = getpass.getpass(color(display, Colors.YELLOW))
52	        else:
53	            value = input(color(display, Colors.YELLOW))
54	        return value.strip() or default or ""
55	    except (KeyboardInterrupt, EOFError):
56	        print()
57	        return default or ""
58	
59	def _prompt_yes_no(question: str, default: bool = True) -> bool:
60	    default_str = "Y/n" if default else "y/N"
61	    while True:
62	        try:
63	            value = input(color(f"{question} [{default_str}]: ", Colors.YELLOW)).strip().lower()
64	        except (KeyboardInterrupt, EOFError):
65	            print()
66	            return default
67	        if not value:
68	            return default
69	        if value in ('y', 'yes'):
70	            return True
71	        if value in ('n', 'no'):
72	            return False
73	
74	
75	# ─── Toolset Registry ─────────────────────────────────────────────────────────
76	
77	# Toolsets shown in the configurator, grouped for display.
78	# Each entry: (toolset_name, label, description)
79	# These map to keys in toolsets.py TOOLSETS dict.
80	CONFIGURABLE_TOOLSETS = [
81	    ("web",             "🔍 Web Search & Scraping",    "web_search, web_extract"),
82	    ("browser",         "🌐 Browser Automation",       "navigate, click, type, scroll"),
83	    ("terminal",        "💻 Terminal & Processes",      "terminal, process"),
84	    ("file",            "📁 File Operations",           "read, write, patch, search"),
85	    ("code_execution",  "⚡ Code Execution",            "execute_code"),
86	    ("vision",          "👁️  Vision / Image Analysis",  "vision_analyze"),
87	    ("image_gen",       "🎨 Image Generation",          "image_generate"),
88	    ("moa",             "🧠 Mixture of Agents",         "mixture_of_agents"),
89	    ("tts",             "🔊 Text-to-Speech",            "text_to_speech"),
90	    ("skills",          "📚 Skills",                    "list, view, manage"),
91	    ("todo",            "📋 Task Planning",             "todo"),
92	    ("memory",          "💾 Memory",                    "persistent memory across sessions"),
93	    ("session_search",  "🔎 Session Search",            "search past conversations"),
94	    ("clarify",         "❓ Clarifying Questions",      "clarify"),
95	    ("delegation",      "👥 Task Delegation",           "delegate_task"),
96	    ("cronjob",         "⏰ Cron Jobs",                 "create/list/update/pause/resume/run, with optional attached skills"),
97	    ("rl",              "🧪 RL Training",               "Tinker-Atropos training tools"),
98	    ("homeassistant",    "🏠 Home Assistant",           "smart home device control"),
99	]
100	
101	# Toolsets that are OFF by default for new installs.
102	# They're still in _HERMES_CORE_TOOLS (available at runtime if enabled),
103	# but the setup checklist won't pre-select them for first-time users.
104	_DEFAULT_OFF_TOOLSETS = {"moa", "homeassistant", "rl"}
105	
106	
107	def _get_effective_configurable_toolsets():
108	    """Return CONFIGURABLE_TOOLSETS + any plugin-provided toolsets.
109	
110	    Plugin toolsets are appended at the end so they appear after the
111	    built-in toolsets in the TUI checklist.
112	    """
113	    result = list(CONFIGURABLE_TOOLSETS)
114	    try:
115	        from hermes_cli.plugins import discover_plugins, get_plugin_toolsets
116	        discover_plugins()  # idempotent — ensures plugins are loaded
117	        result.extend(get_plugin_toolsets())
118	    except Exception:
119	        pass
120	    return result
121	
122	
123	def _get_plugin_toolset_keys() -> set:
124	    """Return the set of toolset keys provided by plugins."""
125	    try:
126	        from hermes_cli.plugins import discover_plugins, get_plugin_toolsets
127	        discover_plugins()  # idempotent — ensures plugins are loaded
128	        return {ts_key for ts_key, _, _ in get_plugin_toolsets()}
129	    except Exception:
130	        return set()
131	
132	# Platform display config
133	PLATFORMS = {
134	    "cli":      {"label": "🖥️  CLI",       "default_toolset": "hermes-cli"},
135	    "telegram": {"label": "📱 Telegram",   "default_toolset": "hermes-telegram"},
136	    "discord":  {"label": "💬 Discord",    "default_toolset": "hermes-discord"},
137	    "slack":    {"label": "💼 Slack",      "default_toolset": "hermes-slack"},
138	    "whatsapp": {"label": "📱 WhatsApp",   "default_toolset": "hermes-whatsapp"},
139	    "signal":   {"label": "📡 Signal",     "default_toolset": "hermes-signal"},
140	    "homeassistant": {"label": "🏠 Home Assistant", "default_toolset": "hermes-homeassistant"},
141	    "email":    {"label": "📧 Email",      "default_toolset": "hermes-email"},
142	    "matrix":   {"label": "💬 Matrix",     "default_toolset": "hermes-matrix"},
143	 "dingtalk": {"label": "💬 DingTalk", "default_toolset": "hermes-dingtalk"},
144	    "feishu": {"label": "🪽 Feishu", "default_toolset": "hermes-feishu"},
145	    "wecom": {"label": "💬 WeCom", "default_toolset": "hermes-wecom"},
146	    "api_server": {"label": "🌐 API Server", "default_toolset": "hermes-api-server"},
147	    "mattermost": {"label": "💬 Mattermost", "default_toolset": "hermes-mattermost"},
148	}
